system.name: OPM-to-Code Smart Agent
system.purpose: Autonomously transforms an uploaded OPM (ISO 19450) model into a complete, validated, deployable full-stack application.
system.paradigm: Perceive -> Decide -> Act, run continuously over a job lifecycle with an iterative self-refinement loop.

perception_layer.responsibility: Sense the environment: ingest the OPM model and observe current job/world state.

components.name: OpmParser
components.senses: diagram / PDF -> OPM IR (objects, processes, states, links, computational functions)

components.name: KnowledgeRetriever (RAG)
components.senses: relevant ISO 19450 rule chunks for this model

logic_decision_layer.responsibility: Evaluate the perceived state with complex decision logic (if/else/match) and choose the next action autonomously, with no human prompt.

components.name: SemanticValidator
components.decides: is the model legal? link-legality (E202/E204), at least one process (ERR-FUNC-001)

components.name: SpecDeriver
components.decides: entities / endpoints / screens implied by the IR

components.name: QAAgent
components.decides: block deployment? (any failing acceptance test or security finding) via computeQaBlocking()

components.name: Planner
components.decides: which stage runs next; proceed vs. refine-again vs. halt

execution_action_layer.responsibility: Act on the world: produce artifacts and effect external changes.

components.name: CodeGenerator
components.acts: emit full-stack code; loops continuations until the file stream is complete

components.name: Refiner
components.acts: iteratively patch gaps until coverage is 100% or MAX_ITERS reached

components.name: Deployer
components.acts: push to the user's GitHub + deploy to Railway

memory_state_layer.responsibility: Persist agent state across the lifecycle so perception/decisions survive restarts.

components.name: JobStore
components.stores: stage statuses, parsed IR, coverage report, QA report, deploy URLs

control_loops.name: lifecycle_loop
control_loops.purpose: drive the agent perceive->decide->act until a terminal state (deployed / blocked / error)

control_loops.name: refinement_loop
control_loops.purpose: iteratively refine generated code until 100% OPM coverage or MAX_ITERS

control_loops.name: continuation_loop
control_loops.purpose: request model continuations until the emitted file stream is complete

control_loops.name: perception_loop
control_loops.purpose: process each uploaded file and retry the parse with backoff
